H2: Photo Magnet FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Photo Magnets

Transform Your Favorite Photos into High-Quality Magnets

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options Shape Options Photo Upload Design Options Production Time Quantity Selection Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Photo Magnets for Personal & Business Use

Create memorable photo magnets that bring your favorite images to life on any magnetic surface. Our custom photo magnets combine professional-grade magnetic material with high-resolution photo printing, delivering vibrant colors and sharp detail that preserves your precious memories. Perfect for refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards, and magnetic displays. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Each photo magnet features a durable laminate finish that protects your image from moisture, fingerprints, and daily wear. Whether you're creating save the date magnets for special events, promotional materials for your business, or personalized gifts for family and friends, our photo magnets offer exceptional quality and lasting durability.

Upload your photos directly through our online design tool or submit high-resolution files for professional printing. Our photo magnets accommodate everything from family portraits and vacation memories to business logos and promotional graphics, making them versatile solutions for both personal and commercial applications.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Order Process & Design Methods

Creating your custom photo magnets is simple with our streamlined ordering process. Choose between our intuitive online designer or professional file upload options to ensure your photos are printed with exceptional quality and precision.

Design Process

Our easy-to-use online designer allows you to quickly upload photos from your computer and customize your magnets with text, colors, and design elements. Simply select your preferred size, upload your image, and use our design tools to create personalized photo magnets that capture your vision perfectly.

For professional results, upload high-resolution .eps files that ensure maximum print quality. Once you've designed your photo magnets and added them to your cart, select your preferred shipping method to complete the design phase.

Payment

All photo magnet orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards for immediate processing. Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your custom photo magnets enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your photo magnet order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system enables you to monitor your order through every stage of our production process, from initial processing to final delivery. Click the tracking link in your email to access real-time updates on your photo magnet production status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production scheduling offers multiple turnaround options for your custom photo magnets, ranging from one to five business days. Production time begins once file upload is complete and proof approval is received, ensuring your photo magnets meet quality standards before printing.

1 Business Day Priority Production

When deadlines are critical, our priority production delivers your photo magnets in just one business day. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day. Emergency same-day options may be available - contact our customer service team to discuss expedited production for urgent photo magnet orders.

2 Business Days Express Production

Express production provides an ideal balance of speed and flexibility for time-sensitive photo magnet projects. This option works perfectly when you need quick turnaround but have slightly more flexibility than our priority service. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option offers reliable three-day turnaround at no additional cost. Standard production provides ample time for quality control while maintaining fast delivery for most photo magnet applications. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the next business day.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Save money with our extended production timeline when your photo magnet project allows additional time. This cost-effective option maintains the same quality standards while offering significant savings for non-urgent orders. Production begins the business day following order approval.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Cut Options & Finishing

Choose from multiple cutting options to achieve the perfect look for your custom photo magnets. Each cutting method offers distinct advantages depending on your design requirements and intended application.

Die Cut Photo Magnets

Die cutting creates photo magnets that follow the exact contour of your image or design. This precision cutting method removes excess material around your photo, creating a professional custom shape that highlights your image perfectly. Ideal for logos, portraits, or any design where you want the magnet shape to match your photo's outline.

Square Cut Photo Magnets with Rounded Corners

Our standard finishing option provides clean, professional edges with slightly rounded corners for safety and durability. This traditional rectangular format works excellently for most photo applications and provides a classic, polished appearance that complements any image style.

Square Cut Photo Magnets

Sharp, precise rectangular cuts create clean edges and modern aesthetics for your photo magnets. Square cutting maximizes the magnetic surface area and provides a contemporary look that works particularly well for business applications, product photos, and geometric designs.

All photo magnet finishing options include a protective laminate coating that guards against moisture, scratches, and fading while maintaining vibrant photo quality over time.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Artwork Requirements

Achieve outstanding print quality for your photo magnets by following our artwork specifications. Proper file preparation ensures your photos reproduce with sharp detail, accurate colors, and professional results that showcase your images beautifully.

Preferred File Types for Photo Magnets

For optimal photo magnet printing, submit Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or PDF (Adobe PDF) files with a maximum size of 100 MB. When using these vector formats, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution and ensure accurate text reproduction on your photo magnets.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG (JPEG), TIFF, and PNG files for photo magnet production. These raster formats work well for photographic content and should meet specific resolution requirements to achieve professional print quality.

Photo Magnet File Setup Tips

Set up your artwork proportionate to your exact photo magnet order size for accurate scaling. Convert all text elements to outlines to preserve font appearance and allow for bleed only when necessary. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files, and clearly indicate cut lines for any custom-shaped photo magnets.

Resolution Guidelines for Photo Magnets

High-resolution files ensure your photo magnets print with exceptional clarity. Submit files at 100% scale with 100 dpi minimum, 50% scale at 200+ dpi, 25% scale at 300+ dpi, or 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi for optimal results. Low-resolution files may result in pixelation that compromises photo quality on your finished magnets.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Shipping & Delivery

Your custom photo magnets typically arrive within 2-4 business days after production completion, depending on your selected shipping method and destination. We partner with reliable carriers to ensure safe delivery of your finished photo magnets.

Shipping Methods for Photo Magnets

Choose from multiple shipping options to match your timeline and budget requirements. Standard shipping provides reliable delivery for most photo magnet orders, while expedited options are available when you need faster arrival times. All shipping options include tracking information so you can monitor your photo magnet delivery progress.

Shipping Time Expectations

Remember that shipping time is separate from production time when planning your photo magnet delivery. Your total timeline includes both production days (1-5 business days depending on your selection) plus shipping time (2-4 business days for most destinations). Factor both timeframes when ordering photo magnets for specific events or deadlines.

Important Photo Magnet Shipping Notes

Photo magnets are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit and maintain print quality. Magnetic materials require special handling considerations, and our packaging ensures your photo magnets arrive in perfect condition, ready for immediate use on magnetic surfaces.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet Installation & Application

Applying your custom photo magnets is straightforward and requires no special tools or adhesives. The magnetic backing provides instant, repositionable attachment to any ferrous metal surface, making installation and removal simple and damage-free.

Preparing the Magnetic Surface

Clean the target surface with a damp cloth to remove dust, grease, or debris that might interfere with magnetic adhesion. Photo magnets work best on smooth, flat metal surfaces such as refrigerators, filing cabinets, whiteboards with steel backing, and magnetic bulletin boards. Ensure the surface is completely dry before applying your photo magnets.

Applying Your Photo Magnets

Simply place your photo magnet against the prepared metal surface and press gently to ensure full contact. The magnetic backing will automatically secure the magnet in position. Photo magnets can be easily repositioned or removed without leaving residue or causing surface damage, making them perfect for temporary or changeable displays.

Maximizing Photo Magnet Performance

For strongest magnetic hold, ensure the entire back surface of your photo magnet makes contact with the metal surface. Avoid placing magnets over paint chips, rust, or uneven surfaces that might create air gaps. Store unused photo magnets flat and away from extreme temperatures to maintain magnetic strength and prevent photo damage over time.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Photo Magnets?

Photo magnets are custom-printed magnetic products that combine high-resolution photographic printing with flexible magnetic backing material. Made from durable magnetic vinyl with a protective laminate finish, these magnets allow you to display your favorite photos, business graphics, or promotional images on any magnetic metal surface. Photo magnets are commonly used for refrigerator displays, office organization, promotional giveaways, and personalized gifts, offering a practical way to showcase images while providing functional magnetic attachment.

Design Your Custom Photo Magnets Today

Ready to transform your photos into durable, professional-quality magnets? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to create custom photo magnets that perfectly capture your images with vibrant colors and sharp detail. Whether you're designing promotional materials for your business, creating personalized gifts, or preserving family memories, our photo magnets deliver exceptional quality and lasting performance.

Upload your photos through our online design tool or submit professional files for expert printing. With flexible production times, multiple cutting options, and reliable shipping, we make it simple to create photo magnets that exceed your expectations. Consider pairing your photo magnets with our custom car magnets for comprehensive magnetic marketing solutions.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Photo Magnet FAQs

What magnetic materials are used to make photo magnets?

Photo magnets are made from flexible magnetic vinyl material that provides strong adhesion to ferrous metal surfaces. All photo magnets include a protective laminate finish that guards against moisture, scratches, and UV fading while maintaining vibrant photo quality over extended use.

What surfaces do photo magnets stick to?

Photo magnets adhere to any ferrous metal surface including refrigerators, filing cabinets, steel doors, magnetic whiteboards, and metal bulletin boards. They do not stick to aluminum, brass, copper, or non-metal surfaces, so verify your target surface contains iron or steel before ordering.

Can photo magnets get wet without damage?

Yes, photo magnets feature a waterproof laminate coating that protects the printed image from moisture exposure. The magnetic backing is also moisture-resistant, making these magnets suitable for kitchen use, bathroom applications, and other areas where occasional water contact may occur.

Is there a minimum order quantity for photo magnets?

No minimum order quantity is required for photo magnets. You can order as few as one custom photo magnet or as many as needed for your project, with pricing that accommodates both small personal orders and large commercial quantities.

Can photo magnets be cut to match my photo's shape?

Yes, we offer die-cut photo magnets that follow the exact contour of your image or design. This precision cutting removes excess magnetic material around your photo, creating a custom shape that perfectly highlights your image while maintaining strong magnetic performance.

Do black and white photo magnets cost less than color versions?

Photo magnet pricing is based on size and quantity rather than color content. Black and white photos print at the same cost as full-color images, allowing you to choose the aesthetic that best suits your design without price considerations affecting your decision.

What are creative ways to use custom photo magnets?

Photo magnets serve many creative purposes including family photo displays, business promotional giveaways, real estate marketing tools, event announcements, product showcase magnets, and personalized gifts. They're also popular for organizing spaces with labeled photo magnets that identify contents or locations while adding visual interest.
